description: A process engineer has identified that a slightly different grade of a solvent can be used in a product. The Bill of Materials (BOM) needs to be updated.

nodes.task_description: Open the BOM for the specified product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the current list of materials for the product.

nodes.task_description: Initiate a change control request to modify the BOM.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new change request.

nodes.task_description: As part of the change request, replace the old solvent part number with the new one and submit for approval.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the BOM within the change control workflow and routes it for QA approval.
